description:
Missing English Translations for Recruitment HTML Partial

The recruitment.html partial template file lacks English language translations, causing content to display incorrectly or not at all for English-speaking users.

Requirements:
- Locate the recruitment.html partial template file in the codebase
- Identify all text strings and content that need English translations
- Create or update the English locale file (e.g., en.yml, en.json) with appropriate translation keys
- Ensure all translatable strings in recruitment.html use proper i18n syntax
- Verify translations render correctly when English locale is selected
- Check for any nested partials or components within recruitment.html that may also need translations
- Test the recruitment page with English locale to confirm all content displays properly
- Ensure translation keys follow the project's naming conventions

Edge cases to consider:
- Pluralization rules for dynamic content
- Date/time formatting specific to English locales
- Any region-specific variants (en-US, en-GB, etc.)
- Fallback behavior if translations are missing
